productDisplayName: Quechua  Ultralight Backpack Purple 16 ltr Bag
description: Designed for walkers, this Arpenaz 15 Ultralight bag is compact and can be folded into ball when not in use. Perfect for those short day trips, to the college and for kids on a weekend hike, this bag is a must have for everyone.Capacity: 15 litresWeight: 110 g Warranty: 5 years Made of 100% polyamide for durability and comfort One main zippered compartment and one outer zippered pocket with ample space to stash away belongings Shoulder straps for easy handling Drawcord to hold the bag when it's rolled into a ball CareStore backpack in a dry placeDo not machine wash, tumble dry, dry clean, bleach or ironHand wash using luke warm soapy waterUse waterproofing spray after a few years to renew water-repellant property of the Fabric
